description: A pentadecapeptide with potent cytoprotective, angiogenic, and wound-healing properties under experimental conditions.
A synthetic version of the naturally occurring peptide present in all cellular components promoting endothelial cell differentiation and angiogenesis.
A proprietary experimental blend combining cytoprotective properties, angiogenic stimulation, and tissue remodeling mechanisms.
A multifaceted blend incorporating anti-inflammatory KPV with tissue repair agents for comprehensive cellular research.
A tripeptide (Lys-Pro-Val) featuring strong antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
A non-erythropoietic peptide engineered to interact with the innate repair receptor, reducing inflammation and neurodegeneration.
A dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist fundamentally altering energy metabolism and insulin secretion profiles.
A dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist fundamentally altering energy metabolism and insulin secretion profiles.
A dual GIP and GLP-1 receptor agonist fundamentally altering energy metabolism and insulin secretion profiles.
A novel triple hormone receptor agonist (GIP, GLP-1, and Glucagon) exhibiting pronounced metabolic regulatory effects.
A selective GLP-1 receptor agonist with structural modifications to extend plasma half-life via albumin binding.
A long-acting amylin analog investigated for its synergistic action in energy balance and satiation mechanisms.
A modified fragment of the C-terminal region of Human Growth Hormone noted for lipolytic stimulation.
An inhibitor of the enzyme nicotinamide N-methyltransferase (NNMT), implicated in cellular energy expenditure.
A mitochondrial-derived peptide regulating metabolic homeostasis and preventing diet-induced obesity in models.
An estrogen-related receptor (ERR) agonist simulating structural metabolic adaptations similar to endurance training.
A PPARδ receptor agonist evaluating alterations in fatty acid oxidation and exercise endurance mechanisms.
A synthetic tetrapeptide proven to upregulate telomerase activity and extend cellular lifespan in in-vitro models.
A naturally occurring copper complex involved in widespread remodeling, collagen stimulation, and anti-oxidant activity.
A crucial cellular coenzyme found in all living cells, essential in metabolic red-ox reactions and sirtuin function.
A crucial cellular coenzyme found in all living cells.
A direct precursor to NAD+, actively investigated for its capability to mitigate age-associated physiological decline.
A mitochondria-targeted peptide (Elamipretide) that binds cardiolipin to restore mitochondrial bioenergetics.
A synthetic heptapeptide derived from human tuftsin showcasing marked anxiolytic and nootropic potentials.
An ACTH analog known for its neuroprotective, neuromodulatory and potent cognitive enhancement effects.
A short synthetic peptide influencing cerebral cortex functions and enhancing cellular resistance to hypoxia.
Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide, a neuropeptide affecting central neuroendocrine regulations and circadian rhythms.
A TREK-1 potassium channel antagonist under study for robust antidepressant-like mechanisms.
A synthetic GHRH analog that increases pulsatile growth hormone and IGF-1 secretions without altering cortisol levels.
A long-acting GHRH analog paired with a Drug Affinity Complex to maximize half-life and stimulate continuous GH release.
A potent autocrine glycoprotein that acts as an antagonist to myostatin, substantially accelerating muscle hypertrophy.
A highly engineered variant of Insulin-like Growth Factor-1 with an extended half-life dictating profound cellular hyperplasia.
Pegylated Mechano Growth Factor, a slice variant of IGF-1 promoting localized stem cell proliferation strictly in muscle tissue.
An orally active, non-peptide secretagogue of the ghrelin receptor elevating GH and IGF-1 secretion.
Recombinant Human Growth Hormone essential for systemic cellular regeneration, growth, and metabolic regulation.
Human Chorionic Gonadotropin; extensively utilized to stimulate the Leydig cells in the synthesis of endogenous testosterone.
Human Menopausal Gonadotropin used in advanced fertility research to stimulate follicular growth and spermatogenesis.
A highly selective and potent GHRP that stimulates massive growth hormone release safely without spiking cortisol or prolactin.
A hexapeptide acting as a strong growth hormone secretagogue and ghrelin receptor agonist.
One of the most potent fast-acting GH secretagogues.
A 29-amino acid polypeptide representing the shortest functional fragment of endogenous GHRH.
A synthetically stabilized GHRH analog verified to reduce severe visceral adipose tissue accumulation.
The active fragment of kisspeptin crucially stimulating the secretion of GnRH to reset the HPTA axis.
A neurohypophysial hormone mediating complex social, reproductive, and stress-regulating behaviors.
A synthetic analog of alpha-MSH inducing remarkable melanogenesis and demonstrating robust aphrodisiac properties.
A cyclic heptapeptide functioning as an agonist at melanocortin receptors heavily researched for sexual dysfunction.
An investigative anti-cancer peptide binding strongly to MDM2 in cellular membranes orchestrating rapid tumor cell necrosis.
An octapeptide acting as an elongation of Argireline, interfering with the SNARE complex to minimize topical wrinkle formation.
A nonapeptide requiring zinc for biological activity, involved fundamentally in T-cell differentiation and maturation.
An endogenous modifier of immune response directly augmenting the operational efficiency of T-cell-mediated responses.
A synthetic dipeptide targeting the normalization of metabolic processes in bone and cartilaginous tissues.
A tetrapeptide clinically proven to stimulate cellular proliferation and reduce apoptosis within cardiovascular tissues.
A dipeptide immuno-modulator aimed at restoring optimal physiological ratios among T-lymphocyte sub-populations.
A specialized bioregulator peptide targeting cellular regeneration precisely within prostate gland tissues.
A synthesized targeted peptide designed to correct morphological and functional parameters of the male reproductive system.
Sterile water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol. Essential for correctly reconstituting lyophilized peptides for long-term stability.
31G x 8mm sterile U-100 syringes tailored for painless, extremely precise subcutaneous dosing under research conditions.
